            <tr>
                <td id="Title9731276" width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">

            <tr>
                <td id="Summary9731276" align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">

                            A 7.5 magnitude earthquake struck western Japan on Monday afternoon, triggering a tsunami alert and prompting an official warning…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName9731280" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="Href9731280" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACAARLFGLI4CV6XT7I2NMC4PYFTS5ZWQ67UEUL2XAK6NPBCV3CEX6M7D2QG5CWST5HJD3CYNNSZWMIFF4V7BKI6XCGOST3DTMIO226DNOINRJE6U6CYQBRVQDILFBJ5HSYGO4J25KS3CPFHYQVP23WVEOQ5OC4TSLUTVZHEW7BRJPDYWIBQ27&" target="_blank">

                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">

</tr>
